rules.doc: Unreal exports a class via an UPPERCASE_API macro: `class SDFPARTICLES_API UFoo : public UObject {}`. tree-sitter-cpp misreads the macro as the class name and drops the real name. Match cpp class/struct whose name is the export macro and rename to the next C identifier (the true type name), tagging api_exported=true.
Same export-macro fix as unreal/api-export-rename but for `struct SDFPARTICLES_API FFoo`.

Example set_attr rule: tag UCLASS-like engine objects (cpp class names beginning with U/A/F/S/T followed by a capital, e.g. UObject, AActor, FVector) with an unreal_type marker so queries can filter engine types. Adds an attribute only; does not rename or drop.
